appendix_baselines.description: Simple working-memory baseline constrained to the most recent history budget.
appendix_baselines.fairness_notes: Included as an appendix control, not the headline comparison.
appendix_baselines.known_limitations: No durable memory outside the visible recent window.
appendix_baselines.name: context_window

appendix_baselines.archetype: Flat timestamped notebook with lexical retrieval.
appendix_baselines.description: Simple append-only markdown notes retrieved by keyword overlap.
appendix_baselines.fairness_notes: Included as an appendix control, not a canonical notebook competitor.
appendix_baselines.known_limitations: No latest-win correction semantics or structure.
appendix_baselines.name: markdown_memory

appendix_baselines.archetype: Raw chunk retrieval with local embeddings.
appendix_baselines.description: Simple vector/lexical retrieval over raw note chunks with no higher-level memory model.
appendix_baselines.fairness_notes: Uses local embeddings only; deterministic when available.
appendix_baselines.known_limitations: No temporal invalidation, graph expansion, or prospective behavior.
appendix_baselines.name: vector_rag

context_summary.archetype: Recent-turn context with a rolling deterministic summary.
context_summary.description: Strong context-window control without graph semantics or durable memory objects.
context_summary.fairness_notes: Honors the same probe budgets as every other measured baseline.
context_summary.known_limitations: No persistent graph, cue recall, or associative traversal.

context_window.description: Simple working-memory baseline constrained to the most recent history budget.
context_window.fairness_notes: Included as an appendix control, not the headline comparison.
context_window.known_limitations: No durable memory outside the visible recent window.

crewai_memory.archetype: Workflow-oriented short-term, long-term, entity, and contextual memory.
crewai_memory.description: Built-in memory stack for orchestrated multi-agent workflows.
crewai_memory.fairness_notes: Tracked on the page but not yet runnable in-suite.
crewai_memory.known_limitations: More workflow-centric than a direct temporal-memory architecture peer.
crewai_memory.why_included: Relevant framework comparison for orchestration-heavy agents.

engram_full.archetype: Cue-first long-term memory with graph recall and prospective triggers.
engram_full.description: Full Engram memory loop using episodic capture, selective projection, cue recall, graph-aware retrieval, and prospective memory.
engram_full.fairness_notes: Real GraphManager path in lite mode; no fixture-only shortcuts.
engram_full.known_limitations: Hybrid vector search is optional and not enabled in the default run.

engram_full_hybrid.description: Optional Engram variant that uses hybrid lexical/vector search inside the same benchmark harness.
engram_full_hybrid.fairness_notes: Only available when a compatible embedding provider is configured.
engram_full_hybrid.known_limitations: Optional appendix variant, not part of the default public comparison.
engram_full_hybrid.why_included: Lets the suite show vector-backed Engram behavior when configured.

engram_no_cues.archetype: Engram without cue and projection pathways.
engram_no_cues.description: Strict Engram ablation with cue recall and targeted projection disabled.
engram_no_cues.fairness_notes: Same GraphManager path with cue-related features turned off.
engram_no_cues.known_limitations: Does not represent an external system; attribution-only baseline.

engram_search_only.archetype: Engram entity search without activation or prospective features.
engram_search_only.description: Strict Engram ablation that keeps searchable graph memory but disables activation, cue recall, and prospective retrieval.
engram_search_only.fairness_notes: Same underlying memory store with retrieval features disabled.
engram_search_only.known_limitations: Attribution-only baseline rather than a market comparison.
engram_search_only.why_included: Shows where search alone stops being sufficient.

graphiti_temporal_graph.archetype: Temporal graph memory with validity-aware retrieval and 2-hop expansion.
graphiti_temporal_graph.description: Proxy for Graphiti/Zep-style temporal graph memory with deterministic graph expansion, current-state filtering, and local lexical/vector fusion.
graphiti_temporal_graph.fairness_notes: Offline deterministic proxy using local embeddings where available.
graphiti_temporal_graph.known_limitations: No cue layer, no consolidation cycles, and no intention trigger model.
graphiti_temporal_graph.why_included: Closest architectural peer on temporal and graph-aware memory.

hybrid_rag_temporal.archetype: Chunk retrieval with lexical and vector fusion plus temporal filtering.
hybrid_rag_temporal.description: Raw-retrieval control with deterministic current-state filtering over vector and lexical matches.
hybrid_rag_temporal.fairness_notes: Uses local embeddings for offline reproducibility.
hybrid_rag_temporal.known_limitations: No cue recall, no intention triggers, and no graph traversal.
hybrid_rag_temporal.why_included: Modern retrieval baseline without long-term memory architecture.

langgraph_store_memory.archetype: Recent thread window plus rolling summary and durable store lookup.
langgraph_store_memory.description: Proxy for LangGraph-style persistence with a recent thread window, deterministic summary, and a store of durable facts keyed by entities/topics.
langgraph_store_memory.fairness_notes: Offline deterministic proxy, not a direct LangGraph SDK integration.
langgraph_store_memory.known_limitations: No graph traversal, cue packets, or prospective trigger engine.
langgraph_store_memory.why_included: Represents framework-native thread persistence plus store memory.

letta.archetype: Pinned memory blocks and editable agent memory state.
letta.description: Stateful-agent memory system built around explicit core memory blocks and editable long-term memory.
letta.fairness_notes: Tracked on the page but not yet runnable in-suite.
letta.known_limitations: A fair proxy is less clear without direct product integration.
letta.why_included: Important public comparison target for stateful agents.

llamaindex_memory.archetype: Framework memory queue plus optional long-term extraction.
llamaindex_memory.description: Framework-native memory primitives combining short-term buffers and optional long-term extraction/retrieval.
llamaindex_memory.fairness_notes: Tracked on the page but not yet runnable in-suite.
llamaindex_memory.known_limitations: Less direct as a temporal-memory peer than Mem0 or Graphiti.

markdown_canonical.archetype: Structured latest-win notebook with lexical retrieval.
markdown_canonical.description: Human-readable canonical notebook with deterministic sections for current facts, corrections, open loops, and intentions.
markdown_canonical.fairness_notes: Compression and retrieval are deterministic and budget-bounded.
markdown_canonical.known_limitations: No graph semantics, cue layer, or activation model.
markdown_canonical.why_included: Fair markdown-file baseline instead of a toy notes file.

markdown_memory.archetype: Flat timestamped notebook with lexical retrieval.
markdown_memory.description: Simple append-only markdown notes retrieved by keyword overlap.
markdown_memory.fairness_notes: Included as an appendix control, not a canonical notebook competitor.
markdown_memory.known_limitations: No latest-win correction semantics or structure.

mem0_style_memory.archetype: Extracted durable memory objects with slot updates and compressed recall.
mem0_style_memory.description: Proxy for Mem0/OpenMemory-style memory that extracts, normalizes, updates, and retrieves compressed memory objects instead of transcript chunks.
mem0_style_memory.fairness_notes: Offline deterministic proxy using shared scenario extraction fixtures.
mem0_style_memory.known_limitations: No graph walk, cue memory, or proactive intention triggering.
mem0_style_memory.why_included: Represents current market memory-layer products for agents.

vector_rag.archetype: Raw chunk retrieval with local embeddings.
vector_rag.description: Simple vector/lexical retrieval over raw note chunks with no higher-level memory model.
vector_rag.fairness_notes: Uses local embeddings only; deterministic when available.
vector_rag.known_limitations: No temporal invalidation, graph expansion, or prospective behavior.
